scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/types/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/queue/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:apps: pnpm exec tsc -p apps/event-manager/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:worker"
scripts.setup: pnpm run db:generate && pnpm run db:migrate
